required_columns.bet_num: positive integer; authoritative customer bet order
required_columns.payout: numeric amount matching payout business rule
required_columns.return_for_entain: numeric amount matching return business rule

money_precision.policy: Monetary formulas are calculated with Decimal, rounded to cents with ROUND_HALF_UP, and compared with a deterministic one-cent absolute tolerance to absorb source floating-point residue.

invalid_record_policy: Any row with one or more rule failures is quarantined and excluded from aggregation. Invalid early bets are not replaced by later bets in first-20 features.
